name: Tests a batch deletion where one record exists and another does not. Verifies partial success and an error for non-existent records.
fullName: test/integrations/component.test.ts#/home/runner/work/rudder-transformer/rudder-transformer/test/integrations/destinations/zoho/router/data.ts Tests zoho destination router -> Tests a batch deletion where one record exists and another does not. Verifies partial success and an error for non-existent records. $descriptionSuffix (index: 7)
description:
Feature: router
      Description: Tests a batch deletion where one record exists and another does not. Verifies partial success and an error for non-existent records.
      Success Criteria: Existing record is deleted with a 200 response; non-existing record fails with a 400 error indicating no record found.
      Scenario: Delete action scenario for Zoho Leads mixing valid and invalid lead IDs in one batch.
      Test ID: zoho_deletion_2
      API Version: v0
